output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?team ?teamLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q816145 wdt:P54 ?team .
  ?team rdfs:label ?teamLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?teamLabel) = 'en')
}

question: what mlb teams did deion sanders play for
reference_answer: New York Yankees (1989–1990) | Atlanta Braves (1991–1994) | Cincinnati Reds (1994–1995) | San Francisco Giants (1995) | Cincinnati Reds (1997, 2001)
